overview: Behara College of Engineering and Technology (BCET) is a newly established technical institution (2024) located in the serene surroundings of Narava, Visakhapatnam. The college is part of the Behara Group of Institutions and aims to provide quality technical education with a focus on modern industry requirements like AI and Data Science.
accreditation: Approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), New Delhi, and affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Gurajada, Vizianagaram (JNTUGV).

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering
B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering
B.Tech in Electrical and Electronics Engineering

admissions.admissionProcess: Admission is through the Andhra Pradesh EAPCET counseling process for 70% of seats (Category A). Remaining 30% seats (Category B/Management Quota) are filled based on merit in 10+2 marks as per APSCHE guidelines.
admissions.importantDates: AP EAPCET 2026: May 2026; Counselling/Web Options: June - July 2026.

facilities: Separate Hostels for Boys and Girls
Transport (Bus facility for Vizag and surrounding areas)
campus.specialNote: The campus is situated in a pollution-free environment near Narava, about 6 km from the main city traffic, offering a focused academic atmosphere.

contact.address: Narava, 88th Ward, GVMC, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh - 530027
